text: We are a small team of IT professionals, between us we have decades of experience. We pride ourselves on providing security solutions for on premise and cloud services that perfectly meet the needs of our clients. Why BSS? Bespoke Support Solutions was launched with business experience, demonstrating risk management, reducing costs and growing your business. Â All business need to be both competitive, provide value and maintain the trust of your clients. Â The BSS on demand consultancy services are there when you need them, reducing the costs of highly skilled resource, and subsequent costs associated with training and maintaining certifications. Quite simply we do what we do best, so you can you do what you do best. What Consultancy Services do BSS provide? The BSS service include all stages of business. Â From bid support across all sectors, supporting IT operations with modernisation on demand when needed, virtual Chief Information Security Officer (CISO,) risk management consultancy, Cyber Essentials certification Â and ISO 27001 maintenance support. Â These services require extensive knowledge, skilled individuals and time. Â Our virtual service allows our clients to focus on the primary objective of growing, maintaining their business, whilst being cost effective. What does success look like to BSS clients? â Our consultants enable our clients to develop and grow. Â Our proactive approach supports bidding for new business, supporting strategy setting and maintaining certification. Â Our clients spend Less time on operational management, and more time on innovation, growth and expansion. We like to see ourselves as an IT partner who understands your business and can guide you through the complexity of digital and data security. To help reduce your cyber security risk, safeguard your data and the data of your clients and potential clients and ensure that you have the safest and most efficient environment to work in possible. Smaller businesses are an increasing target for cybercriminals, and are at greater risk of closing following an attack. As the number and severity of cyber threats increase, we continually update and expand our knowledge and review our service to stay one step ahead.
